message.content:
The screenshot displays the **Settings page** of a voice room app, with a green gradient background and a structured layout of interactive elements. Here’s a detailed breakdown:  


### 1. Header & Navigation  
- **Title**: “Settings” (centered at the top, white text).  
- **Close Button**: A white “X” icon in a green circle (top-right corner) to exit the settings page.  


### 2. User Profile Section  
A light blue card with rounded corners containing:  
- **User ID**: “user_65848557885” (white text, left-aligned).  
- **Tag**: “Tag” (white text, left-aligned, with a right-facing arrow indicating it’s a clickable option).  
- **Profile Icon**: A gray silhouette of a person (left side of the card).  
- **Room Announcement**: “Add your room announcement here.” (gray text, with a right-facing arrow; a green chat bubble icon is to the left of this text).  


### 3. Mic & Permission Settings  
A light blue card with rounded corners (below the user profile section) containing:  
- **Mic Mode**:  
  - Label: “Mic Mode” (white text, left-aligned).  
  - Current Setting: “Chat - 5 Mics” (white text, right-aligned).  
  - **Pause Button**: A white pause icon (circle with two vertical bars) to the right of “Chat - 5 Mics” (likely to toggle mic mode).  
- **Mic Permission**:  
  - Label: “Mic Permission” (white text, left-aligned).  
  - **Red Stop Icon**: A red square (stop button) to the right (likely to disable mic access).  


### 4. Admin & Membership Settings  
A light blue card with rounded corners (below the mic settings) containing:  
- **Admin Permission**:  
  - Label: “Admin Permission” (white text, left-aligned).  
  - **Pencil Icon**: A white pencil (edit button) to the right (to modify admin permissions).  
- **Membership Fee**:  
  - Label: “Membership Fee” (white text, left-aligned).  
  - Current Setting: “80” (white text, right-aligned) with a blue diamond icon (likely a currency symbol) to the left of “80”.  
- **Remove Members**:  
  - Label: “Remove Members” (white text, left-aligned) with a right-facing arrow (clickable option).  
- **Room Entry Blocked List**:  
  - Label: “Room Entry Blocked List” (white text, left-aligned) with a right-facing arrow (clickable option).  
- **Operation Records**:  
  - Label: “Operation Records” (white text, left-aligned) with a right-facing arrow (clickable option).  


### 5. Daily Bonus Section  
A light blue card with rounded corners (at the bottom of the screen) containing:  
- **Daily Bonus**: “Daily Bonus” (white text, left-aligned) with a right-facing arrow (clickable option).  


### Additional UI Details  
- **Color Scheme**: Green gradient background, light blue cards for sections, white text for labels/settings, and colored icons (red, blue, orange) for interactive elements.  
- **Icons**: Right-facing arrows indicate clickable options; pause, stop, pencil, and diamond icons serve functional purposes (toggle, disable, edit, currency).  
- **Layout**: Vertical list of cards, each with clear labels and interactive elements, ensuring easy navigation.  


This layout prioritizes user profile management, mic/chat controls, admin permissions, and room customization—core features of a voice room app.
